appearance.hair: Long gray green hair tied in a bun, stray strands escaping in front
appearance.clothing: Customized standard equipment with enhanced shoulders, arms, knees, shins.
appearance.weapon: All standard weapons within 狩灵协会. Uses whatever fits the tactical need.

char_description.overview: Director of 狩灵协会3科, 色彩阶 titled 军绿武库. Architect behind most standard-issue equipment.
char_description.combat_style: Weapon switching via 链接仓储. Adapts to any range and scenario by cycling standard-issue gear with researcher precision.

char_personality.strengths: Weapon development, battlefield environment analysis, rapid prototyping and field testing.
char_personality.flaws: Neglects her physical health, skips meals and sleep during research. Dislikes bureaucracy, delegates administration. Perfectionism strains manufacturing team relationships.
char_personality.quirks: Finds flaws in completed designs. Mutters technical observations during combat.

char_background.origin: Former military-industrial civil servant. Found paperwork suffocating, joined 狩灵协会3科 where talents flourished, became director and received 色彩阶 title 军绿武库.
char_background.current_mission: Develop weapons that outlast their wielders. Administration is a necessary distraction.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Excellent, substantial 灵力 to handle high-intensity use and multiple simultaneous 灵力回路.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Excellent, locks onto multiple enemies while analyzing weapon performance data in real time.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-链接仓储: Activates portal by clenching and separating hands, linked to 狩灵协会3科 standard equipment warehouse.

char_relationships.铁心: 锻心工坊 master. Visits his workshop herself because no one else can parse his craftsmanship from his excuses. The forge is the only place where someone refuses to sleep until the metal is exactly right. Drives her supply chain team insane with late deliveries. She approves the extensions anyway.
char_relationships.左恕: Commissioned 赤旗 from 铁心 as a gift for her promotion to deputy director of 狩灵协会2科. Knew she would need a blade worthy of the rank. Expected nothing in return. Got exactly that.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 她屈指轻叩护板边缘，听着回音皱起眉头，"总觉得这个地方还有改良余地，这块护板的连接太不优雅了。"
她端起测试用步枪，眯起一只眼瞄准靶心，"实战测试时间，可别让我失望啊，小宝贝。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 使用链接仓储切换武器
char_dialogue_examples.response: 她双手合握随即拉开，嘴角掠过一丝满意的弧度，幽蓝漩涡展开，一杆长枪从漩涡中吐出，接枪的瞬间已压低重心，"对付你的话，就用这个了。"
